name: Scalable Visual Pretraining for Language Intelligence
summary: arXiv:2607.09657v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The rapid progress of large foundation models has been driven predominantly by pretraining on large-scale text corpora. However, many forms...
description: arXiv:2607.09657v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The rapid progress of large foundation models has been driven predominantly by pretraining on large-scale text corpora. However, many forms of knowledge are conveyed through visual representations, where figures, typeset equations, and page layouts carry rich information that cannot be faithfully or completely captured by text alone. Yet...
author: Yiming Zhang, Zhonghan Zhao, Wenwei Zhang, Haiteng Zhao, Tianyang Lin, Huanze Tang, Yunhua Zhou, Demin Song, Kuikun Liu, Haochen Ye, Haian Huang, Yuzhe Gu, Haijun Lv, Qipeng Guo, Bin Liu, Gaoang Wang, Kai Chen
